name: Onfleet Last-Mile Delivery API
what_it_does: Onfleet REST API for last-mile delivery management and route optimization platform. Enables AI agents to create and assign delivery tasks, optimize routes, track drivers in real-time, capture proof of delivery, send customer notifications, and integrate delivery operations into e-commerce and logistics workflows. Onfleet is used by grocery, pharmacy, food delivery, and logistics companies.
use_cases: Creating and assigning delivery tasks from order fulfillment agents
Optimizing delivery routes from logistics planning agents
Tracking driver location and ETA from customer notification agents
Capturing proof of delivery and syncing with order management agents
not_for: Long-haul freight management without last-mile focus
Field service without delivery workflow requirements
best_when: An e-commerce, grocery, pharmacy, or food service company wants AI agents to automate last-mile delivery dispatch, route optimization, and customer communication.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Driver location tracking and customer delivery addresses are personal data. Real-time GPS data requires appropriate disclosure to drivers.

auth.notes: Onfleet uses API key in Basic auth (key as username, empty password). Keys are organization-scoped. Simple authentication model for server-side integrations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: 14-day free trial; no permanent free tier
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter, Basic, Premium, and Professional plans based on tasks per month
pricing.notes: Task-based pricing model. US company. API access included on all plans. Developer-friendly documentation.

performance.rate_limits: 20 requests/second by default; upgradeable for enterprise

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Driver GPS location and customer delivery addresses require disclosure
No public MCP server — REST API with Basic auth (API key as username)
Rate limit of 20 req/sec — batch task creation for bulk orders
Route optimization is async — request route then poll for completion
Webhook signature validation recommended for production deployments
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Real-time GPS tracking and customer delivery addresses. SOC2. API key Basic auth. US-only data residency. Driver location disclosure required.

security_score_components.security_notes: GPS tracking and delivery address data. SOC2. API key Basic auth. US-only. Driver location disclosure required.
